title: Comment from HIMSS Electronic Health Record Association, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: On behalf of nearly 30 member companies that develop, implement, and support certified health IT for the vast majority of hospitals and ambulatory providers nationwide, the HIMSS Electronic Health Record (EHR) Association appreciates the opportunity to provide input on Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions to Unleash Prosperity (HTI-5) Proposed Rule. Our comments are attached.

attachments.title: EHR Association Comments to ASTP on HTI-5 Proposed Rule
